next_steps: Start empirical treatment with amphotericin B and flucytosine
Perform cryptococcal antigen testing on both serum and CSF
Send CSF for fungal culture, India ink stain, and PCR for infectious pathogens including Listeria and Mycobacterium tuberculosis
Perform 24-hour urine collection for free cortisol and fractionated catecholamines/metanephrines
Obtain plasma ACTH and serum cortisol levels
Consult neurosurgery for evaluation of elevated intracranial pressure and potential external ventricular drain
